versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   pelagia-ceph-1-7-0              true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: ceph
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: pelagia-ceph-1-7-0
      name: pelagia-ceph
      namespace: ceph-lcm-mirantis
      values: |
        pelagia-ceph:
          rookConfig:
            csiKubeletPath: /var/lib/k0s/kubelet
